arts.sum: Cristiano Biraghi will be hoping to make amends for his own goal that cost Torino a 3-2 defeat to Bologna on the brink of stoppage time last week. On the other hand, AC Milan need to put in a good pe...

arts.ttl: Aghehowa STUNNER leaves Chelsea counting cost of Joao Felix NIGHTMARE
arts.sum: Felix joined the Blues last summer for €52 million but made just three Premier League starts before being loaned out to Milan in January, with Chelsea already losing faith over the 24-year-old’s long-term future at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea had agreed a deal with Atletico Madrid for Aghehowa last summer as part of the transfer that took Conor Gallagher the other way but the move collapsed late on after a reported medical issue.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: AC Milan aim to part ways with Hernandez in next window
arts.sum: AC Milan are set to make left-back Theo Hernandez available for transfer, while Newcastle are looking to complete a move to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford in the summer. - Newcastle United are hopeful of completing a move to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford, according to the Daily Mail .
